title: cyclopogon papilio
intro: Cyclopogon papilio, also known as Butterfly Ginger, is a type of flowering plant in the Asphodelaceae family native to Central and South America. It is a perennial plant with fragrant flowers and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclopogon papilio include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its fragrant essential oils.
